titles.title: The Blood Will Never Lose It's Power (2)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The blood that Jesus shed for me, Way back on Calvary; The blood that gives me strength From day to day, It will never lose it's power.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For It reaches to the highest mountain, And It flows to the lowest valley; The blood that gives me strength From day to day, It will never lose its power.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It soothes my doubts and calms my fears, And it dries all my tears; The blood that gives me strength From day to day, It will never lose its power
